History

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alianore de la Spine於1385年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，她的父親Sir Guy de la Spine25歲，母親Lady Katherine Holt31歲。她於1409年6月25日與Sir John de Throckmorton在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利享年82歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾聖 約翰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alianore de la Spine于1385年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，她的父亲Sir Guy de la Spine25岁，母亲Lady Katherine Holt31岁。她于1409年6月25日与Sir John de Throckmorton在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年在英国武斯特斯爾福拉德波利享年82岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾聖 約翰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Spine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Rocco, Sebastiano, Antonio, Carmine, Carmino, Emidio, Nichola, Nicola, Sando.
Italian: nickname from the Greek adjective spinos ‘thin, spindly’ or the noun spinos ‘linnet’.
Italian: habitational name from any of various places so named, for example Spino d'Adda in Cremona province.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alianore de la Spine was born in 1385, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Guy de la Spine, was 25 and her mother, Lady Katherine Holt, was 31. She married Sir John de Throckmorton on 25 June 1409, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1467, in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in St John, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alianore de la Spine est née en 1385, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Guy de la Spine, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Holt, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Throckmorton le 25 juin 1409, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1467, à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à St John, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alianore de la Spine 1385 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Guy de la Spine 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Holt 31. Sie hat am 25. Juni 1409 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England Sir John de Throckmorton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1467 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England und wurde in St John, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alianore de la Spine è nata il nel 1385 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir Guy de la Spine, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Holt, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Throckmorton il 25 giugno 1409, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1467, nel Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a St John, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alianore de la Spineが1385年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Sir Guy de la Spineは25歳，母Lady Katherine Holtは31歳であった。1409年6月25日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンでSir John de Throckmortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーで82歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルスト ジョンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alianore de la Spine(이)가 1385년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Guy de la Spine(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Holt(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1409년 6월 25일 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 Sir John de Throckmorton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 스트 존에 묻혔다.

pt.1409: de 10 de janeiro de 1409 a 9 de janeiro de 1410
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alianore de la Spine nasceu em 1385, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Guy de la Spine, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Holt, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Throckmorton em 25 de junho de 1409, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1467, em Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em St John, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alianore de la Spine родилась в 1385 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Guy de la Spine было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Holt, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Throckmorton 25 июня 1409 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1467 г. в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности ст джон, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alianore de la Spine nació en 1385, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Guy de la Spine, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Holt, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir John de Throckmorton el 25 de junio de 1409, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1467, en Fladbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en St John, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
